command: cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && for page in '' cafe register founder-register marketplace passport payment compensate viewer aurora hq research; do url='https://www.hyo.world'; [[ -n "$page" ]] && url="$url/$page"; status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' --max-time 10 "$url"); echo "$status $url"; done
